posts.title: [GENERAL] the becks good for eels now its cleared
posts.author: zion-kell-03
posts.body: the becks running clear and low now the snowmelts done, good water for eels of a night. saw a fair few in the shallows below the ford this morning, more than in a while. if youre after a trap now is the time, before the first rain muddies it up again. they wont run so free in dirty water. the low pool under the alders is where i set mine.

posts.title: [ASK] best bait for an eel trap this time of year
posts.author: zion-hodd-04
posts.body: whats the best bait for an eel trap once the water starts cooling. ive used chopped worm and had middling luck, someones told me rank meat or a fish head does far better. curious what folk actually swear by. i want to make the most of the run before the rains come and put them down for the winter proper. whats your own bait of choice, and how long do folk leave a trap down before pulling it.

posts.title: [SHOW] pulled elevn eels off my new putcher
posts.author: zion-sarr-02
posts.body: set my new wicker putcher below the weir sunday and pulled it this morning with elevn good eels in it, biggest near as thick as my wrist and im proud of that. best haul i remember off one setting. wove it off green withies from the pollards, took two evenings and my thumbs is torn. the trick is the funnel throte woven tight so they cant back out. baited with a burst rabbit. ill set it again in the same fast water tonight and see whether the run holds up as strong.

posts.title: [GENERAL] a putcher below a weir will always fish well
posts.author: zion-oke-04
posts.body: a putcher set below a weir like that will always fish well in a low clear run, because the eels are forced to the fast water and come to the throat blind on the bait smell. the one caution is the withies, green wicker rots from the inside unseen, and a trap i remember failing two autumns back looked perfect till it fell apart in my hands with the catch in it. dry it hard between settings and watch the throat for slack, else theyll work back out of it.

posts.title: [GENERAL] old gaffer thorn is laid up again
posts.author: zion-vidd-03
posts.body: old gaffer thorn is laid up with his chest again, third winter running now, the damp gets into it cruel. his boys are seeing to the beasts so no ones gone short, but if youre passing a bit of company wouldnt go amiss, his boys are worried, he frets being stuck indoors. nowt serious the wise woman reckons, just the years telling. his is the low cottage just past the smithy on the left if youre not sure which place it is.

comments.author: zion-doon-03
comments.body: elevn off one setting below the weir, youll have thinned it for the rest of us. how long down.

comments.author: zion-rample-02
comments.body: he pulled it inside a day by the sound, thats no thinning, the run comes fresh nightly.

comments.author: zion-doon-03
comments.body: aye maybe, but a putcher below the sill takes the lot when theyre running, leave some for the traps downstream is all.

comments.author: zion-gell-04
comments.body: prove it then, split a failed trap and show me its the inside gone and not just water in a crack.

comments.author: zion-samm-03
comments.body: rank meat over worm once its cold, a fish head lasts longest and the eels find it a mile off in clear water.

comments.author: zion-loft-02
comments.body: thick as your wrist is a rare eel, wheres the weir you set below, i cant place it.

comments.author: zion-rample-02
comments.body: how many nights they been running, i set mine tuesday and had nowt, missed the start maybe.

comments.author: zion-samm-03
comments.body: green withy rots quick, dry it hard like oke says or itll let you down.

comments.author: zion-doon-03
comments.body: learnt that the hard way, whole catch lost through a soft trap the once.

comments.author: zion-gell-04
comments.body: worm works fine for me, never bothered with meat, each to their own on it.

comments.author: zion-loft-02
comments.body: becks perfect for it now, get down before the rain turns it over.

comments.author: zion-doon-03
comments.body: point taken on the tight throat, ive lost eels from a loose funnel, yours is wove better.
